title: Drypetes principum
taxonomy: Drypetes principum is classified within the family Putranjivaceae, a family of flowering plants. This family is part of the larger clade of Malpighiales, which includes various other plant families such as Calophyllaceae and Euphorbiaceae. The exact classification of Drypetes principum is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, order Malpighiales, family Putranjivaceae, genus Drypetes, species D. principum. Drypetes principum is a species of flowering plant that is native to Southeast Asia. Further research and classification may be required to confirm its exact taxonomic position.

This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in treating various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and even certain types of cancer.
